name: Micro3
description: Micro3 is a quest-based growth platform built to help Web3 projects launch airdrops, onboard users, and scale their brand through interactive, on-chain engagement. By turning real user actions into verifiable quests and on-chain credentials, Micro3 enables projects to attract high-quality users, measure meaningful participation, and reward long-term contributors. This creates transparent, sustainable community growth across multiple Web3 ecosystems.
